name: honcho-codex
description: Honcho memory integration for Codex lifecycle hooks

interface.shortDescription: Persistent Honcho memory for Codex sessions.
interface.longDescription: Adds Honcho memory recall and message ingestion to Codex using lifecycle hooks. The MVP saves user and assistant messages only, not tool calls.
defaultPrompt: Set up Honcho memory for this project.
Recall Honcho context for this repo.
